_help: Copy this file to voices.json (same folder), set reference_id to your own Fish Audio model id (the last path segment of https://fish.audio/m/<id>), edit the clip texts, then run: node generate-sounds.mjs. Keys starting with _ are ignored. IMPORTANT: do NOT clone copyrighted characters, brands, or real people's voices — you are responsible for the voice models and text you use.
